ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient (e.g., existing conditions, allergies) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the patient */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Specific medical condition(s) the patient is being treated for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the medical facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of medical facility (e.g., hospital, clinic, research center) */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* Medical specialties offered by the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who took the test */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test administered (e.g., blood test, imaging) */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was administered */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES medical_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving treatment */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment administered (e.g., medication, surgery) */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of treatment */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of treatment */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment (e.g., ongoing, completed, terminated) */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the treatment */,
  "prescribing_doctor" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES medical_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_prescribing_doctor FOREIGN KEY ("prescribing_doctor") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the outcome */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the outcome occurred */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome occurred */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES medical_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., research, clinical, administration) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the research study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient enrolled in the study */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was enrolled in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_outcomes" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "permission_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., patient data, research studies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_type", "permission_scope")
)
